category_sources: Official ChucK site describes a programming language for real-time sound synthesis and music creation.
source_facts.description: concurrent, on-the-fly audio programming language.
display_name_sources: Official ChucK site and GitHub repository use the stylized name ChucK.
docs_sources: Official ChucK site provides a dedicated documentation section under /doc/.
repo_sources: Official ChucK GitHub README gives the source clone URL https://github.com/ccrma/chuck.git.
tags_sources: Official ChucK site describes real-time sound synthesis and on-the-fly code modification.
source_facts.description identifies an audio programming language.
